chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-776 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case(Priority) 1.For orders on o/objections 2.For hearing of CMA 3515/21 3.For hearing of main case 24-09-2024 Mr. Abdul Naeem Pirzada, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Assistant A.G-Sindh. ***** Learned counsel for the petitioner is unable to satisfy the Court as to whether application, as mandated by an order dated 14.05.2024, passed by learned Divisional Bench of this Court in Petitions No.D-730 of 2019 etc, to the Chief Secretary, Sindh has been made or not. He is directed to follow mythology given in the said order by sending a direct application by registered courier to the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh, who to consider the said application in accordance with law and needful be done. No case for indulgence is made out and accordingly, this petition along with listed application is dismissed in the above manner. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
